name: Hot and Sour Stir-Fried Vegetables (Pad Pak Priew Waan)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a large pan over medium heat.
2. Add sliced onions and bell peppers to the pan.
3. Sauté until vegetables are slightly softened.
4. Stir in minced garlic, grated ginger, soy sauce, vinegar, sugar, and chili flakes.
5. Cook for another 2-3 minutes until the mixture is well combined.
6. Add chopped mushrooms, bok choy, and bamboo shoots to the pan.
7. Stir-fry vegetables until they are tender but still crisp.
8. Turn off the heat.
